prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年理科（物理类）最低位次分别为11294→17463→15415→24309→23204名，整体呈后移趋势，近两年在23000-24000区间波动，2025年基准约23204名；该校在河南省理科（物理类）招生计划2021年113人、2022年115人、2023年116人、2024年113人、2025年116人，2026年大幅扩招至175人，较2025年增加59人（增幅约50.9%），扩招幅度显著，对竞争有较大缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第24名，近年排名持续上升（2021年第30→2026年第24），学校层次高、综合实力强；2024年声誉评价为"明显负面"，主要因招生沟通不畅、专业设置不合理导致投档线暴跌约500名，对报考心理有滞后影响。抖音热度排名总榜第13位（高热），综合热度约387万，短视频曝光度较高，反映报考关注度上升；第五轮学科评估A-及以上7个：作物学A+、兽医学A+、畜牧学A+、草学A+、食品科学与工程A+、植物保护A、生物学A，农林类学科实力顶尖，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度高热推荐，该校均开设相关大类，吸引高分考生报考；本省2026年考生总数约120万（不确定标记），按2025年比例估算物理类约73.4万人，较2025年55.5万增加约32.3%，竞争加剧；该校位于北京，属一线城市，对河南考生有较强地域吸引力；university_enrollment_summary中2025年该校在河南招生占比约16.4%，为外省主要生源地之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招（+50.9%）对竞争的缓解作用、本省物理类考生增加（+32.3%）对竞争的加剧作用、学校层次持续上升及抖音高热度的正面影响、2024年声誉负面事件的滞后影响，考虑考生增加和学校热度对冲部分扩招效应，预测最低位次约29786名，区间29286-30286名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for science (physics category) were 11294 → 17463 → 15415 → 24309 → 23204, showing an overall backward trend, fluctuating around 23000-24000 in recent two years, with a baseline of about 23204 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Henan Province was 113 in 2021, 115 in 2022, 116 in 2023, 113 in 2024, 116 in 2025, and a significant expansion to 175 in 2026, an increase of 59 (about 50.9%) compared to 2025, which greatly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 24th in the 2026 main list of Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities, with a continuous rise in recent years (30th in 2021 → 24th in 2026), high level and strong comprehensive strength; the 2024 reputation evaluation was "significantly negative", mainly due to poor enrollment communication and unreasonable major settings, causing a sharp drop of about 500 in the admission line, with a lagging impact on application psychology. Douyin heat ranking 13th overall (high heat), with a comprehensive heat of about 3.87 million, high short video exposure, reflecting increased application attention; the fifth round of discipline evaluation has 7 A- or above: Crop Science A+, Veterinary Medicine A+, Animal Science A+, Grass Science A+, Food Science and Engineering A+, Plant Protection A, Biology A, with top-tier agricultural and forestry disciplines, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering are highly recommended with high social heat, and the university offers related broad categories, attracting high-scoring candidates; the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is about 1.2 million (uncertain mark), estimated physics category about 734,000 based on 2025 proportion, an increase of about 32.3% compared to 555,000 in 2025, intensifying competition; the university is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, with strong regional appeal to Henan candidates; in the university_enrollment_summary, the university's enrollment proportion in Henan in 2025 is about 16.4%, making it one of the main source provinces outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical backward trend of rankings, the alleviation of competition from the significant expansion in 2026 (+50.9%), the intensification of competition from the increase in physics category candidates in the province (+32.3%), the positive impact of the university's rising level and high Douyin heat, and the lagging effect of the 2024 negative reputation event, taking into account that the increase in candidates and university heat partially offset the expansion effect, the predicted lowest ranking is about 29786, with a range of 29286-30286.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were 1425 → 1666 → 1528 → 1902 → 3337, showing an overall backward trend. In 2025, due to the change in exam format to history category, the ranking significantly shifted backward to 3337, with a baseline of approximately 3337. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Henan Province was 15 in 2021, 15 in 2022, 16 in 2023, 17 in 2024, and 37 in 2025 (including Yantai Research Institute programs). The 2026 plan is 31, a decrease of 6 from 2025 (a reduction of about 16.2%), intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 24th in the 2026 main ranking of Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities, with a continuously rising ranking in recent years, indicating a high university level. In 2024, the reputation evaluation was 'significantly negative' (the admission score line dropped sharply by about 500 places), which has a lagging impact on application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 13th overall (high heat), with a comprehensive popularity of about 3.87 million, indicating high application attention.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has high social popularity recommendation, Chinese language/literature is recommended, teacher training/education is divided and wait-and-see, with overall stable to slightly hot popularity for liberal arts majors. The total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is about 1.2 million, with an estimated 466,000 in the history category based on the 2025 proportion, an increase of about 32.3% from 352,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. The university is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional appeal for liberal arts examinees in Henan. In 2025, the university's overall enrollment proportion in Henan was about 16.4%.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of historical rankings, the dual intensification of competition due to the 2026 enrollment reduction (-16.2%) and the increase in history category examinees in the province (+32.3%), the positive impact of the university's high level and high Douyin popularity, and the lagging impact of the 2024 reputation negative event, and considering that the significant increase in examinees further pushes up competition, the predicted minimum ranking is about 2962, with a range of 2518-3406.
